visual_summary: A component that displays a grid of features showcasing different icons, text, and backgrounds, likely used in a demo or showcase page.
generation_prompt: Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics: Name: Bento Vertical Demo Description: A component that displays a grid of features showcasing different icons, text, and backgrounds, likely used in a demo or showcase page. Style: dark, minimal, image backgrounds Interactions: clickable Tags: grid, card, demo Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
